scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/server dist/.openai dist/assets && cp index.html styles.css script.js student-engagement-portal.html dist/ && cp assets/profile-emem-akpan.jpg assets/student-ridge-actual-predicted.png assets/ai-credit-risk-shap-drivers.png assets/scam-risk-shap-dependence.png assets/uk-housing-affordability.png assets/energy-demand-forecast-comparison.png assets/post16-vfm-dashboard.png assets/office-occupancy-executive-dashboard.png assets/abc-bank-ai-insights-dashboard.png dist/assets/ && cp .openai/hosting.json dist/.openai/hosting.json && cp server/index.js dist/server/index.js
scripts.build:netlify: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/assets && cp index.html styles.css script.js student-engagement-portal.html dist/ && cp assets/profile-emem-akpan.jpg assets/student-ridge-actual-predicted.png assets/ai-credit-risk-shap-drivers.png assets/scam-risk-shap-dependence.png assets/uk-housing-affordability.png assets/energy-demand-forecast-comparison.png assets/post16-vfm-dashboard.png assets/office-occupancy-executive-dashboard.png assets/abc-bank-ai-insights-dashboard.png dist/assets/
